Compliance.description: CMS registered #1167; GCR AA rating (strong financials); no recent violations; standard waiting periods/late joiner penalties.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.9/5 (249 reviews last 12mo, mostly 1-star); Google 4.3/5 (8.7k reviews).

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing with network discounts; comprehensive benefits (no hospital limits, PMB chronic); transparent brochures; value varies by plan/provider choice.

Innovation.description: Momentum app (digital card, claims); virtual GP consults; Multiply wellness rewards; HealthSaver+; Hello Doctor 24/7.

Customer Support.description: Emergency lines, WhatsApp, app chat; complaints cite rude/slow agents, delays. HelloPeter avg reply 12hrs.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital access via app and web portal; POPIA compliant per membership forms; 2020 group breach (no client data affected); no recent issues found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Ingwe from R645/mo (income-based); Evolve R2029; Custom R2585+; Incentive R3362+ (10% savings); Extender R7939+ (25% savings); Summit R16469 (unlimited hospital)

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed; low HelloPeter but positive testimonials on site; recent news on admin contracts wins.
